calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2022 Vacated

Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 877.6 (Motions)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MIGUEL A. AVILA, Esq. of Sanger Swysen & Dunkle (Tel: 805-962-4887) for plaintiff Adam Lee;
Atty. NICHOLAS R. O'BRIEN-KOVARI, Esq. of Freeman Mathis & Gary, LLP (Tel: 925-644-0918) for defendants Casey Sullivan and Philosopher's Inc. d/b/a Philosopher's Club.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CASEY SULLIVAN, PHILOSOPHER'S INC DBA PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 877.6.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Philosopher's, Inc. and Casey Sullivan's unopposed motion for determination of good faith settlement is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT For Defendants Philosopher???S, Inc. And Casey Sullivan
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MIGUEL A. AVILA, Esq. of Sanger Swysen & Dunkle (Tel: 805-962-4887) for plaintiff Adam Lee;
Atty. NICHOLAS R. O'BRIEN, Esq. of Freeman Mathis & Gary, LLP (Tel: 925-644-0918) for defendants Casey Sullivan and Philospher's Inc. d/b/a Philosphers Club.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CASEY SULLIVAN, and PHILOSOPHER'S INC DBA PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB's Motion for Summary Judgment.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court confirms with counsel for parties that it is the parties' intent for this motion to be taken off calendar.

The Court rules as follows: Defendants' motion is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
